meta.title: WPZOOM Portfolio Lite – Live Preview
meta.description: A ready-to-explore portfolio with sample projects, categories, a filterable gallery and lightbox.

steps.code:
$p ) { list( $title, $cat, $seed ) = $p; if ( get_page_by_title( $title, OBJECT, 'portfolio_item' ) ) { continue; } $post_id = wp_insert_post( array( 'post_title' => $title, 'post_type' => 'portfolio_item', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_content' => 'A sample portfolio project showcasing the work of a creative studio. Replace this with your own projects, images and descriptions.', 'post_excerpt' => 'Sample ' . $cat . ' project created for this live preview.' ) ); if ( $post_id && ! is_wp_error( $post_id ) ) { if ( isset( $term_ids[ $cat ] ) ) { wp_set_object_terms( $post_id, array( $term_ids[ $cat ] ), 'portfolio' ); } $url = 'https://picsum.photos/seed/' . $seed . '/800/600.jpg'; $att_id = media_sideload_image( $url, $post_id, $title, 'id' ); if ( ! is_wp_error( $att_id ) ) { set_post_thumbnail( $post_id, $att_id ); } } } $page_content = '

Our Portfolio

Filter the projects by category and click any item to open it in the lightbox.

'; $existing = get_page_by_path( 'portfolio-demo' ); if ( ! $existing ) { wp_insert_post( array( 'post_title' => 'Portfolio Demo', 'post_name' => 'portfolio-demo', 'post_type' => 'page', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_content' => $page_content ) ); } flush_rewrite_rules();
